description_long: This is a dark-toned bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of a mature man with wavy, swept-back hair and pronounced facial features. The bust is mounted on a round, tiered pedestal base, which adds to its classical appearance. The facial expression is serious and contemplative, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and defined cheekbones. The hair is intricately detailed, with visible curls and texture, especially at the back and sides. The shoulders are broad and the chest is partially draped, suggesting a formal or historical figure. The surface appears to be matte and slightly rough, likely made of cast metal or stone, and the overall form is solid and substantial.
description: A dark, classical bust of a mature man with wavy hair, mounted on a round pedestal. The sculpture features detailed facial features and textured hair, giving it a dignified and historical presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, wavy hair, and the full chest and shoulders of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the hair, and the curvature of the shoulders.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the intricate hair texture and the broad, smooth back of the bust and pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the ear, and the flow of the hair and neck.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is plain and isolated.
